mcp-cad._troubleshooting: If 'Connection closed' error persists: (1) verify venv has mcp_cad installed: '.venv\Scripts\pip show mcp-cad'. (2) Try absolute path: 'C:\Users\andyv\mcp-cad\.venv\Scripts\python.exe'. (3) Run manually to check for errors: '.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m mcp_cad --version'.
mcp-cad._pi_note: Pi may use a different config format. If this doesn't work, try the format from configs/pi-mcp-config-alt.json (without mcpServers wrapper).
